SQLLite.SQL: SELECT ro.report_id AS "ReportId" ,ot.printer_type AS "PrinterType" ,ot.no_of_copies AS "Copies" ,ot.tray AS "Tray" ,du.user_default_printer AS "Printer" ,c.fap_id AS "FAPId" FROM ae_events ae ,report_output ro ,order_types ot ,dca_user du ,courts c WHERE NVL(ae.sod_reference,-1) = ${param.authLstId} AND ae.std_event_id in (174,852,871) AND ae.event_date > TRUNC(SYSDATE-8) AND ro.ae_event_seq = ae.ae_event_seq AND ot.order_id = ro.order_id AND du.user_id = ${param.userId} AND NVL(du.printer_court_code, ${param.courtId}) = c.code ORDER BY ro.report_id

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
